# `EnableAllRam`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>EnableAllRam();</h3>
<ul>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Enables reading/writing to all ram (including $D000-$DFFF). Sets the
three first bits of memory address $01 to %100.</p>
<p><b>Note:</b>Remember to restore the original memory config afterwards, or you won't be able to access the VIC</p>



<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var keep01: byte;

begin
        ....
        // Store original memory config
        keep01 := peek(^$01,0);
        EnableAllRam();

        // Decrunch something that is stored at $D000
        Decrunch(my_image);

        // Restore memory config
        poke(^$01,0,keep01);
end;
</code>


</div>
